crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, check inbox, probe active adapters, and work on highest priority task.

crons.name: nightly-review
crons.prompt: Read and follow .claude/skills/local-ultrareview/SKILL.md. Run the nightly review: get yesterday's commits (6:01 AM to 11:59 PM), close Chrome, run all 3 stages, reopen Chrome. If no commits in the window, skip silently.
